productDisplayName: ADIDAS Men Ab Gr Tee 2 Black T-Shirts
description: Composition Black Round Neck neck t-shirt made of 100% cotton, with short Sleeve sleeves and adidas mountain logo on the left arm, 'All Blacks' embroidered logo on left chest, '16th' Printed in bold metallic colours on the back, and stitch detailing in red across the shoulders, sleeves and the hemline Fit Regular Wash care Machine wash in lukewarm water below 40 degrees, using a mild detergent Wash dark colours separately Do not soak, bleach or tumble dry Dry in shade Warm iron Do not dry clean Do not iron directly on print/trims/ logo Celebrate the spirit of New Zealan'd rugby team of the All Black with this adidas t-shirt. The stylish stitch detailing in contrast colour enunciates well your fashion statement. Team this with jeans and sports shoes for unparalleled cool. Model statistics The model wears size M in t-shirts Height-6'', Chest- 38”
